new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes in containers of 2 litres or less, other than sparkling wine (subheading 2204 10), put up in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar, measured at a temperature of 20 °C; classified under CN subheading 2204 21 09 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the main distinguishing criteria for CN 22042109: (1) it is a StillWine (non-sparkling wine of fresh grapes), (2) in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2204 21 vs. 2204 29), (3) with excess pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar due to dissolved CO₂ at 20 °C. The code string hasValue anchor is also provided. The disjointness from SparklingWine (2204 10) is captured via a complement restriction. A small coverage gap remains for the alternative presentation criterion — 'bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings' — which cannot be cleanly modelled with the existing TBox properties and would require a new structural/packaging property. This packaging detail is omitted to avoid over-engineering, reducing coverage slightly from 1.0.
